target:
# Try with curl to get the screenshots HTML
curl -sL "https://web.archive.org/web/20080610065234/http://www.pokertracker.com/screenshots.html" -o /tmp/pt-screenshots.html 2>&1 && echo "Done, size: $(wc -c < /tmp/pt-screenshots.html)" && grep -i "img\|src" /tmp/pt-screenshots.html | head -30
